message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam ParticipantPadding 10
skinparam BoxPadding 10

participant "RtpSenderEgress" as RtpSenderEgress
participant "ModuleRtpRtcpImpl" as ModuleRtpRtcpImpl
participant "PacketRouter" as PacketRouter
participant "ProcessThreadImpl" as ProcessThreadImpl
participant "PacingController" as PacingController
participant "PacedSender" as PacedSender
participant "RTPSender" as RTPSender
participant "RTPSenderAudio" as RTPSenderAudio

box "RTP" #transparent
end box

box "Call" #transparent
participant "AudioCodingModuleImpl" as AudioCodingModuleImpl
participant "ChannelReceive" as ChannelReceive
participant "ChannelSend" as ChannelSend
participant "AcmReceiver" as AcmReceiver
end box

box "NetEq" #transparent
participant "AudioSendStream" as AudioSendStream
participant "AudioMixerImpl" as AudioMixerImpl
participant "AudioTransportImpl" as AudioTransportImpl
end box

box "Audio" #transparent
participant "AudioDeviceBuffer" as AudioDeviceBuffer
participant "AudioTrackJni" as AudioTrackJni
participant "AudioRecordJni" as AudioRecordJni
end box

== RTP sending ==
RtpSenderEgress -> ModuleRtpRtcpImpl : SendPacket()
activate ModuleRtpRtcpImpl
ModuleRtpRtcpImpl -> ModuleRtpRtcpImpl : SendPacketToNetwork()
deactivate ModuleRtpRtcpImpl

ModuleRtpRtcpImpl -> PacketRouter : TrySendPacket()
activate PacketRouter

PacketRouter -> RTPSender : SendPacket()
activate RTPSender
RTPSender -> RTPSender : ProcessPackets()
RTPSender -> RTPSender : SendRtpPacket()
deactivate RTPSender

PacketRouter -> ProcessThreadImpl : Process()
activate ProcessThreadImpl
ProcessThreadImpl -> ProcessThreadImpl : Process()
deactivate ProcessThreadImpl

PacketRouter -> PacedSender : EnqueuePackets()
activate PacedSender
PacedSender -> PacingController : SendToNetwork()
activate PacingController
PacingController -> RTPSenderAudio : SendAudio()
activate RTPSenderAudio
deactivate RTPSenderAudio
deactivate PacingController
deactivate PacedSender
deactivate PacketRouter

== Audio capture / encode / send ==
AudioCodingModuleImpl -> AudioCodingModuleImpl : Encode()
AudioCodingModuleImpl -> ChannelReceive : Add10MsData()
ChannelReceive -> ChannelSend : SendData()
activate ChannelSend
ChannelSend -> ChannelSend : SendRtpAudio()
deactivate ChannelSend

ChannelSend -> AudioSendStream : ProcessAndEncodeAudio()
AudioSendStream -> AudioMixerImpl : SendAudioData()
AudioMixerImpl -> AudioTransportImpl : RecordedDataIsAvailable()
AudioTransportImpl -> AudioDeviceBuffer : DeliverRecordedData()
AudioDeviceBuffer -> AudioRecordJni : DataIsRecorded()

@enduml
